title: UPSC – Translator, Assistant Mining Engineer and More – 45 Posts

basic_details.job_title: UPSC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 45 Translator, Assistant Mining Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The UPSC Recruitment 2026 notification announces a total of 45 Translator, Assistant Mining Engineer and More vacancies. Candidates with Any Bachelors Degree, B.A, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, B.Lib, M.E/M.Tech Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 09-05-2026, and closes on 29-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through UPSC website, upsc.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.A, B.Tech/B.E, Diploma, B.Lib, M.E/M.Tech

how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online only using the UPSC ORA portal: https://upsconline.nic.in/ora/. - First register/create profile (URN). - Fill Common Application Form (CAF). - Fill post-specific module. - Upload required documents, photograph, and signature. - Pay fee (if applicable) and submit.
